# LinguaX

> LinguaX is a mouse-first productivity utility for macOS.
> It improves third-party mouse behavior (smooth scrolling, gesture/button mapping, app-scoped overrides) and adds app/domain input-source automation.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://linguax.app/
- Download: https://linguax.app/download
- Pricing: https://linguax.app/pricing
- Documentation Entry: https://linguax.app/docs/intro
- Changelog: https://linguax.app/docs/releases/changelog

## High-Intent Guides

- Mouse Enhancement Basics: https://linguax.app/docs/guides/mouse-enhancement-basics
- Setup for Developers: https://linguax.app/docs/guides/setup-for-developers
- Setup for Designers: https://linguax.app/docs/guides/setup-for-designers
- Input Source Auto Switch: https://linguax.app/docs/features/input-source-auto-switch
- Website Language Mapping: https://linguax.app/docs/features/website-language-mapping

## Key Value Statements

- Built for macOS 13+ (Apple Silicon and Intel)
- Core behavior runs locally on device
- Full-feature trial available
- One-time lifetime upgrade available

## Support

- Contact: hello@linguax.app
